name: Slack API
what_it_does: Slack's platform API for sending messages, managing channels, building bots, and automating team workflows, with multiple official MCP servers for agent integration.
use_cases: Sending notifications and alerts to Slack channels from agents
Building interactive bots and slash commands
Searching message history and channel data from agents
Automating team workflows with Slack's Workflow Builder API
Reading and managing channels, users, and workspace data
not_for: External customer communication (use Intercom or Zendesk)
High-volume transactional messaging (use email or SMS APIs)
best_when: Your agents need to communicate with human teams, send alerts, receive commands, or integrate into existing Slack-based team workflows.
avoid_when: Your notification audience is end-customers rather than internal team members, or you need non-Slack messaging.

auth.notes: Bot tokens (xoxb-) for bot app access. User tokens (xoxp-) for user context. Incoming webhooks for simple one-way messaging. OAuth 2.0 for app installations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free workspace: 90-day message history, 10 app integrations
pricing.notes: API access is free. Bot token creation is free. Slack workspace plan affects features available to apps.

performance.rate_limits: Tier 1: 1 req/min, Tier 2: 20 req/min, Tier 3: 50 req/min, Tier 4: 100 req/min (per method)

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Slack errors are returned as JSON with ok: false and error field. Error strings are well-documented and human-readable.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency keys. chat.postMessage calls are not idempotent - retries create duplicate messages.
known_agent_gotchas: Rate limits vary per method tier - agents must implement per-method rate tracking
Bot tokens require specific OAuth scopes - missing scopes give cryptic 'missing_scope' errors
Messages cannot be deleted by bots unless the bot sent them (requires chat:write scope)
Slack's Block Kit message format is powerful but verbose - keep message construction logic separate
Free workspace 90-day history limit affects message search for older data
